name: sgs-hero-video
description: Simple Growth Solutions hero video — Remotion, cinematic-premium, 75s + 30s, 16:9 and 9:16 masters. All rendered in code.

scripts.render:all: remotion render HeroLandscape out/sgs-hero-landscape.mp4 && remotion render HeroPortrait out/sgs-hero-portrait.mp4 && remotion render HeroShortPortrait out/sgs-hero-short.mp4
